temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) A bald man in a dark, green-lit room looks down at a floor covered in glowing, fiery embers. The scene cuts to a close-up of a young man with glasses, Harry, looking down with a worried expression. He then turns and runs through a crowded, dimly lit alleyway, pushing past people. (Storyline: This opening montage introduces two contrasting scenes: one of mysterious destruction and another of a character in a state of distress and urgency, creating immediate tension and mystery.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum builds in intensity, accompanied by the faint sounds of crackling fire and indistinct crowd noise.)
